conflict: Gloria's total refusal to manage Doug's feelings combined with the weight of family history and his dead father's shadow
consequence: Gloria provides an unmediated mirror — Doug sees himself as neither the internet's genius nor his own self-image as a failure, but a specific man with a specific inheritance of saying the wrong thing at the right time
must_land_beats: Gloria's notes on the video — delivered without preamble, mixing harsh and perceptive
The 'only real thing you've said since you were twelve' line — Gloria's highest standard applied to Doug
Lunch at Maple Glen — the retirement community women and their specific generational takes on the video
Deirdre's review: 'the saddest thing she's ever seen that was also funny' — the most accurate review Doug will receive
Gloria's story about Doug's father at a dinner party — small, unpunctuated, no lesson drawn
Gloria's financial calculation — 'not bad for making a fool of yourself'
pressure_source: Gloria's total refusal to manage Doug's feelings combined with the weight of family history and his dead father's shadow
state_shift: Gloria provides an unmediated mirror — Doug sees himself as neither the internet's genius nor his own self-image as a failure, but a specific man with a specific inheritance of saying the wrong thing at the right time
